violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Observed deli ham on the bottom self by raw ribeye. Observed ground beef on the bottom shelf by hashbrown.
Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Consumer self-service sign was not posted where needed or as required. Observed no sign on buffet line.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Observed ranch dressings in cups, reach in cooler, not date marked.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed cardboard on the bottom shelf.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Need quat test strips.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Observed floor in kitchen that was damage at the time of inspection
Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. Observed chemical bottles not labeled
